meaning: adj.<英> 二百年的,存储二百年之久的
examples: The town will have its bicentenary next year.
This exhibition, one of a series marking Dulwich's bicentenary, manages to find six mutual themes.
The painting depicted the last of the four battles of the Bergisel - the bicentenary of which is marked this year.
Last April, the cottage hosted events marking the bicentenary of the Geological Society of London.
The decision was taken to donate the bells as a gift for Chile's bicentenary celebrations in 2010.
